name: angular-gantt-minimal
description: Minimal Angular app that installs ONLY the gantt slice of @jects/angular. It depends on @jects/angular + @jects/gantt and imports from the per-component subpath '@jects/angular/gantt', so a bundler never has to resolve any sibling engine (@jects/grid, @jects/scheduler, …). This is the isolated-install demo for the per-component subpath exports.
